title: Software Developer Intern
description:
This role is for one of AccioJob’s hiring partners: Turtle Software




Job Title: SDE Intern

Work Location: Pune (Onsite)

Stipend: ₹15,000 per month

Internship Duration: 6 months




CTC: ₹4 LPA to ₹5 LPA




Eligibility Criteria

Degrees: Open to all

Branches: Open to all

Graduation Years: 2025, 2026




The Role

As an SDE Intern at Turtle Software, you will work on building and maintaining web applications using modern technologies. You will collaborate with the engineering team, contribute to real-world projects, and gain hands-on experience in full-stack development.




Key Responsibilities

Develop and maintain web applications using modern frontend and backend technologies

Build responsive user interfaces using HTML, CSS, and React

Work on backend development using Node.js

Write clean, efficient, and maintainable code

Collaborate with team members on feature development and bug fixes

Debug, test, and optimize application performance




What You’ll Bring

Strong understanding of HTML, CSS, and JavaScript

Hands-on experience with React and Node.js

Basic understanding of web development concepts

Good problem-solving and analytical skills

Eagerness to learn and work in a fast-paced environment

Good to have: Knowledge of Python and Django




Evaluation Process

Technical Interview – Round 1

Technical Interview – Round 2

HR Interview

title: Product Management-Intern
description:
Job Title - Product Management Intern (6-Month Internship)

Location - Pune, Baner

Department - Product

Internship Details - Duration 6 months

About The Role

We are looking for a Product Management Intern who is curious about how real-world products are built and improved. This internship is designed for people who want to explore product management by working on real product problems. You will work closely with the product team to understand user workflows, identify usability issues, document product behavior, and help shape improvements. Unlike many internships that focus primarily on research or presentations, this role involves hands-on work with the product, engineers, and real users. Working in a startup environment, you will get the opportunity to wear diﬀerent hats, collaborate across teams, and understand how product decisions are made in practice.

What You Will Work On


During the internship, you may work across diﬀerent product areas, including:
Understanding and documenting real user workflows
Identifying UX and usability improvements in existing product flows
Writing product specifications and feature documentation
Helping analyse customer problems and feature requests
Supporting feature testing and release verification
Working with engineers and designers to refine product behaviour
Collaborating with internal teams and occasionally interacting with users to understand how the system is used in the real world
This role is meant to give exposure to how product decisions are actually made in a fast-moving product environment.


What We Are Looking For

We are not looking for a specific degree or background. Instead, we look for people who are:


Curious about how products work
Comfortable breaking down complex problems
Clear thinkers and good communicators
Willing to ask questions and learn quickly
Interested in improving user experiences and workflows
Comfortable working closely with a team in an oﬃce environment
Prior experience in product management is not required.
This role is ideal for someone who enjoys digging into systems, understanding how things work, and finding ways to improve them.


What You Will Learn

By the end of the internship, you will gain exposure to:


How product teams identify and solve user problems
How product requirements and specifications are written
How engineers and product managers collaborate
How real-world software workflows are designed and improved
How product decisions are made in a growing software company


High-performing interns may be considered for a full-time role in the product team.

Application Exercise

Choose one Productivity software product you regularly use (Ex, Notion, Slack, Trello, Google Docs, Calendar, GitHub, etc.).

Identify one workflow that you think could be improved.

Your Response Should Include

a short description of the workflow, the exact step where the problem occurs, why this problem matters for the user one improvement you would propose

Please include 2-3 screenshots of the workflow you are analysing.

You may also mention one improvement idea you considered but rejected. Maximum 300 words.

We review every submission carefully and use this exercise to understand how candidates think about products.

About CrelioHealth

CrelioHealth is a fast-growing health-tech product company delivering cloud-based LIMS, RIS, CRM, and Inventory solutions to diagnostics labs and hospitals globally. We are building scalable systems that power modern healthcare operations.

Website: www.creliohealth.com
Show more

title: Business Development Trainee
description:
Multia is not looking for a typical sales trainee.
We are looking for someone who understands people, thinks clearly, and wants to learn
how meaningful design turns into real business growth.
If you are curious about brands, enjoy conversations, and want exposure to strategy-led
discussions, this role will give you real responsibility from day one.

What you will work on
• Identifying and researching potential clients
• Initiating thoughtful outreach and building early-stage relationships
• Supporting pitch decks and proposals with the design team
• Understanding how branding and strategy decisions are made
• Tracking pipeline and learning structured business development processes

What you will gain
• Direct exposure to founders and brand leaders
• Mentorship from a strategy-focused team
• Real client-facing experience
• Understanding of how a design studio grows sustainably
• Clear pathway to a Business Development Executive role

Who should apply
• 0 to 2 years of experience
• Background in Business, Marketing, or related field
• Strong communication skills
• Interest in branding, design, and business strategy
• Organized and proactive mindset

About Multia
We are a strategy-led design studio building purposeful brands and meaningful visual
identities. We believe design should solve real problems and create long-term impact, not
just visual appeal.
If you want to build a career where business meets thoughtful design, send your CV and a
short note on why this role interests you.
careers@multia.in hr@multiversity.co.in rajnandinil@multiversity.co.in

title: Investment Banking Intern
description:
M&A Research Analyst Intern, Technology Investment Banking




Location: Pune




About this Job:




We are looking for an Investment Banking Intern to support our Technology Investment Banking team across deal origination, sector research, and transaction execution. The role offers hands-on exposure to live mandates while also involving active participation in lead generation, market mapping, and outreach to potential counterparties and investors.




The firm believes in providing appropriate opportunities for building meaningful experience within the cross-border Investment Banking industry, getting exposure to the ecosystem and key external participants in the Investment Banking ecosystem, and building valuable industry connections and professional networks over the longer term. 




Key Responsibilities:




1. Conduct market research, company profiling, and competitive benchmarking to identify emerging investment themes and potential targets.

2. Researching Technology companies across different domains including IT Services, AI, Cloud, IoT, etc. based on various investment parameters such as Revenue, No of employees, industry and other key parameters.

3. Working closely with senior team members on execution of live M&A mandates, including developing an in-depth understanding of target companies (business model, key differentiators, industry positioning, stakeholder alignment, etc.), preparation of transaction collaterals, building financial models, and application of valuation methodologies such as DCF, trading comparables, and transaction comparables.

4. Developing deep understanding of global technology M&A landscape through sector-focused transaction analysis, including evaluation of valuation benchmarks, deal structures, and assessment of strategic rationale and synergies.

5. Building and maintaining key information repository and contact databases with high accuracy.

6. Assisting senior Transaction team with support required on a daily basis with respect to building information lists above in a timely and accurate manner (for eg: you may quickly gather research and information on Top 30-50 AI companies on one day and next day work on different Technology industry segment based on business priorities, etc.).

7. Contribute to business development initiatives through lead generation, outreach to prospective clients and investors, and maintenance of deal trackers and CRM databases.

8. Prepare sector briefs, landscape maps, and insights on emerging sub-sectors such as digital engineering, cloud, data analytics, and healthcare technology.




What We are Looking For:

• Educational Qualification: CA Finalists (both groups of CA Intermediate cleared) or CFA Level I cleared candidates.

• Prior articleship/internship experience in relevant roles (e.g., M&A advisory, FP&A, equity research, transaction support, or investor relations) demonstrating the ability to apply financial analysis and valuation methodologies will be an advantage.

• A self-starter with a strong curiosity for the technology ecosystem and emerging business models.

• Diligent about tracking innovative companies, market trends, and investment activity across tech sub-sectors.

• Strong research capabilities with the ability to manage, structure, and curate large databases, lists, and information sets in Excel or CRM tools.

• Ability to connect insights from the startup and venture world to strategic M&A and investment opportunities in the technology sector.




About the Firm:

SA Global Advisors (SA) is a leading global investment banking firm focused exclusively on growth investments and M&A for the Digital and Technology sectors. Our partners and senior executives are deeply rooted entrepreneurs with more than two decades of experience as founders, operating executives, and investors. We bring a unique perspective shaped by our own successful journeys in scaling, acquiring, growing, and exiting technology companies backed by marquee global investors.




We specialize in high-growth segments across Digital Transformation, Data and AI led Consulting Services, Engineering R&D (ER&D) and Data & Cloud Engineering, with focus on sub-sectors such as Embedded Systems, PLM, MBSE, Digital Manufacturing, Cloud Modernization, Gen-AI & Data Analytics, DevOps & Managed Services.

title: Sales Intern
description:
Job Title: Sales Intern

Location: Remote

Duration: 6 months

Stipend: Fixed + Incentives




About the Company

Kuinbee (kuinbee.com) is building a data-on-demand platform that helps businesses access, buy, and generate high-quality datasets without friction. We operate across data marketplaces, custom data collection, and analytics solutions.




Role Overview

We are looking for a high-energy Sales Intern who can help us drive customer acquisition, build pipelines, and close deals. This role is ideal for someone who wants to learn real startup sales, not just theory.




Key Responsibilities
Identify and research potential clients (startups, enterprises, researchers)
Generate leads through LinkedIn, cold emails, and outbound outreach
Assist in building and managing a strong sales pipeline
Conduct discovery calls and understand customer data needs
Pitch Kuinbee’s offerings (datasets, custom data collection, dashboards)
Support closing deals and maintaining client relationships
Maintain CRM and track sales performance
Work closely with founders on GTM and sales strategy


Who Should Apply
Students or recent graduates interested in sales, startups, or business development
Strong communication and persuasion skills
Comfortable with cold outreach and talking to new people
Self-driven, proactive, and result-oriented mindset
Basic understanding of business, data, or tech is a plus


What You’ll Gain
Hands-on experience in B2B sales and startup growth
Direct mentorship from founders (CEO/COO level exposure)
Opportunity to work on real deals and revenue generation
Strong networking opportunities across industries
Potential full-time PPO (Pre-Placement Offer)


Skills (Mandatory)
Experience with LinkedIn outreach or email marketing
Familiarity with CRM tools (HubSpot, Zoho, etc.)
Interest in data, analytics, or AI




How to Apply

Send your resume + a short note on “Why sales?” to: coo@kuinbee.com

Or apply via LinkedIn.

title: Business Development & Sales Intern (Hybrid) – Pune
description:
About Vistoma Digital




Vistoma Digital is a fast-growing, young marketing agency focused on helping brands grow through digital marketing, performance campaigns, and strategic marketing solutions.




We are looking for a motivated Business Development & Sales Intern who is eager to learn how agencies acquire and manage clients. This role is ideal for students pursuing MBA, BBA, or other management-related programs who want hands-on exposure to sales, client acquisition, and business strategy in a real agency environment.







Role Overview

As a Business Development Intern, you will help identify potential clients, generate leads, support sales conversations, and assist in building new business opportunities for the agency.

You will work closely with the founders and marketing team to understand client needs and help convert opportunities into long-term partnerships.







Key Responsibilities
Research and identify potential clients who may benefit from digital marketing services
Generate and qualify leads through outreach, networking, and online research
Assist in initiating conversations with prospective clients via email, LinkedIn, or calls
Support the sales pipeline by tracking leads, follow-ups, and opportunities
Participate in sales discussions and help prepare proposals or presentations
Build and maintain relationships with potential clients and partners
Stay updated on industry trends, marketing services, and competitor offerings
Collaborate with the marketing team to align client requirements with agency services







Who Should Apply
Students currently pursuing MBA, BBA, or other business/management programs
Strong interest in sales, business development, marketing, or entrepreneurship
Good communication and interpersonal skills
Self-motivated, proactive, and comfortable interacting with new people
Organized and able to manage follow-ups and sales activities
Familiarity with LinkedIn or digital tools for outreach is a plus







Work Structure
Hybrid role based in Pune
Flexible work hours that can accommodate your college schedule
Expected to be available during standard working hours at least 2–3 days per week for meetings and collaboration




Compensation
Base stipend
Performance-based incentives linked to successful lead generation and conversions




What You’ll Gain
Real experience in agency sales and client acquisition
Exposure to digital marketing services and business strategy
Opportunity to work closely with a fast-growing startup team
Build practical sales, communication, and negotiation skills
Potential Pre-Placement Offer (PPO) for high-performing interns

title: Sales Intern
description:
Business Unit: MAES

Division: SAS Commercial

Challenge Yourself and Impact the Future!

MacDermid Alpha Electronics Solutions, a business of Element Solutions Inc (NYSE: ESI), is renowned worldwide for its commitment to revolutionizing the electronics industry. With a legacy spanning over a century, we have continually set new benchmarks for excellence, reliability and sustainability in electronic materials.

Our Expertise:

Wafer Level Solutions - Revolutionizing wafer fabrication processes for enhanced efficiency and performance

Semiconductor Assembly Solutions - Driving innovation in semiconductor assembly processes for unparallelled reliability

Circuitry Solutions - Tailored solutions to meet the dynamic demands of modern circuitry

Circuit Board Assembly Solutions - Elevating circuit board assembly processes for optimal performance

Film & Smart Surface Solutions - Transforming electronics with cutting-edge materials and technologies for enhanced functionality and reliability

Across diverse sectors including automotive, consumer electronics, mobile devices, telecom, data storage, and infrastructure, MacDermid Alpha Electronics Solutions has earned the trust of manufacturers worldwide. Our comprehensive range of high quality solutions and technical services covers the entire electronics supply chain, empowering businesses to thrive in today's competitive landscape.

We strive to embody the five 'Elements of our Culture'- our '5C's'; Challenge, Commit, Collaborate, Choose, and Care. These core values are the foundation of our organization which our employees embrace in their interactions with customers, colleagues and other stakeholders, to drive financial performance and create a rewarding work environment.

Who are we looking for?

We are looking for a motivated intern to support Electrolube India’s technical and sales activities in the Southern/Northern/Western Region. This role is ideal for candidates who are interested in electronics manufacturing materials, conformal coatings, thermal management solutions, and customer-facing technical work.

The intern will assist the sales and CTS team in data management, customer support, product demonstrations, and sample coordination.

What will you be doing?



Technical Support
Assist in preparing product demos, sample preparation, and basic application trials for customers.
Support CTS engineers in collecting customer technical data, coating specifications, and process parameters.
Help document trial reports, test results, and coating application feedback.
Sales Support
Maintain and update customer databases, visit trackers, and sales pipelines.
Assist in creating presentations, product comparison sheets, and technical notes.
Support in follow-ups for sample approvals, PO tracking, and customer queries.
Coordination & Operations
Coordinate with warehouse/logistics for sample dispatch, inventory checks, and material movement.
Work with internal teams (R&D, Quality, Customer Service) for documentation and approvals.
Support in preparing monthly reports, MIS, and market intelligence updates.



Who are You?



Pursuing or completed B.E / Diploma / BSc (Electronics, Electrical, Chemical, Polymer, Mechanical, Materials Science preferred).
Strong interest in electronics manufacturing, coatings, adhesives, or materials technology.
Good proficiency in MS Excel, PowerPoint, and documentation.
Ability to communicate clearly with customers and internal teams.
Willingness to travel occasionally within the region for customer visits.



What competencies will you need?



Curious and eager to learn technical concepts.
Self-driven, organised, and proactive.
Comfortable working in a fast-paced, customer-facing environment.
Good attitude and professional behaviour during customer interactions.



We are Offering...

Equal Opportunity Employer

All qualified applications will receive consideration for employment without regard to race, color, religion, sex, sexual orientation, gender identity, national origin, age, pregnancy, genetic information, disability, status as a protected veteran, or any other protected category applicable under federal, state and local laws.

title: Influencer Marketing Intern
description:
Company Description


Onyx Digital is a dynamic and forward-thinking digital marketing agency specializing in innovative solutions for businesses to grow their online presence. With a focus on creativity and data-driven strategies, we partner with brands to craft impactful marketing campaigns that drive engagement. Our goal is to empower clients with cutting-edge digital tools and build lasting relationships with their audiences. At Onyx Digital, we foster a collaborative work environment that values passion, creativity, and professional growth.


Role Description


This is a full-time Influencer Marketing Intern role, based on-site in the Pune Division. The intern will support the team in researching and identifying potential influencers across various social media platforms, building and maintaining relationships with influencers, and coordinating influencer campaigns. Daily tasks include drafting outreach messages, analyzing campaign performance, preparing reports, and assisting with administrative tasks as needed. The role offers an excellent opportunity to gain hands-on experience in influencer marketing and social media strategy in a fast-paced and creative environment.


Qualifications

Strong research and analytical skills to identify and evaluate potential influencers and assess campaign performance
Excellent communication skills, with the ability to craft professional outreach messages and effectively collaborate with internal teams and influencers
Understanding of social media platforms, including Instagram, YouTube, TikTok, and other emerging platforms
Organizational and time management skills to handle multiple tasks and meet deadlines
Proficiency in digital tools and software related to social media management, campaign tracking, and analytics is a plus
Pursuing or completed a degree in Marketing, Communications, Social Media, or a related field is preferred

title: Trainee, Project Management
description:
Company Description

At Konecranes, we believe that great customer experience is built on the people behind the Konecranes name. Everything we do, we do with passion and drive. We believe diversity drives business success and is the foundation for our growth. We welcome different backgrounds and skills that enrich our community and we promote a place where we can ALL be ourselves. This is what makes Konecranes a unique place to work.

Job Description

Job Summary:

We are looking for a motivated and detail-oriented Project Management Fresher to join our team. As a Project Management Trainee, you will assist in planning, executing, and closing projects under the guidance of senior project managers. This is an excellent opportunity to gain hands-on experience in managing real-world projects across various domains.

Key Responsibilities:


Organizing Kick off meeting for all assigned new order with Internal stake Holders for smooth order transfer.
Preparation and control of schedules/project plans for all orders.
Conduct regular planning & review meetings to ensure project timelines.
Single window for all communication with Customer in regard to approvals, project schedules and delivery plans.
Organizing Inspections as required under QAP.
Coordination with site team for schedules and ensuring project timelines.
Project milestone update to customer.
Coordination with design team for the detail engineering.
Cost management/Budget control with the help of senior manager.
SAP Knowledge would be an extra advantage.
Coordination with commercial team on AR (account receivables).
Coordination with site team for project closure.
Maintain project documentation and ensure compliance with internal processes
Awareness of ISO 14001 & 45001 standards


Qualifications

Qualification: Diploma (DET) – Electrical.

Experience: Fresher or 0-1year experience.

Competencies and skills, we expect for this role:


Excellent written and verbal communication
Proficiency in MS Office (Excel, Word, PowerPoint); familiarity with tools like SAP & MS Project is a plus.
Ability to work with team to achieve goals.
Target Driven
Eagerness to learn and grow in a fast-paced environment


Additional Information

What we offer you:

In return, we can offer you exciting and challenging Specialist – Project Management and flexible working environment to form a part of the Konecranes & Demag Industrial Cranes India team, you will create value added support locally and in delivering services as per our Lifting People Strategy.

Additional information:

Please apply through www.konecranes.com/career

Konecranes moves what matters. We are a global leader in material handling solutions, serving a broad range of customers across multiple industries. We consistently set the industry benchmark, from everyday improvements to the breakthroughs at moments that matter most, because we know we can always find a safer, more productive and sustainable way. That's why, with 16 000+ professionals in over 50 countries, we are trusted every day to lift, handle and move what the world needs.

Konecranes is committed to ensuring that all employees and job applicants are treated fairly in an environment which is free from any form of discrimination.

title: Trainee Software Engineer (Frontend) - MedInsight (Dev)
description:
About Milliman

Milliman is among the world's largest providers of actuarial and related products and services. Our mission is to serve our clients to protect the health and financial well-being of people everywhere. Founded in 1947, Milliman is an independent firm with offices in major cities around the globe. We are owned and managed by our principals, senior consultants whose selection is based on their technical, professional, and business achievements. Milliman serves the full spectrum of business, financial, government, union, education, and nonprofit organizations. In addition to our consulting actuaries, Milliman's body of professionals includes numerous other specialists, ranging from clinicians to economists.

We are looking for an enthusiastic Trainee Software Engineer with a desire to grow their knowledge and experience as part of our team.

About Milliman’s MedInsight Team

Leading with our core values of Quality, Integrity, and Opportunity, MedInsight is the healthcare industry’s most trusted solution for healthcare intelligence. Our company’s purpose is to empower easy, data-driven decision-making on important healthcare questions. Through our products, education, and services, MedInsight is making an impact on healthcare by helping to drive better outcomes for patients while reducing waste. Over 300 leading healthcare organizations have come to rely on MedInsight analytic solutions for healthcare cost and care management.

Job Overview

We are seeking a motivated and enthusiastic Trainee Full Stack Engineer to join our dynamic team. In this role, you will have the opportunity to gain hands-on experience working with advanced software development technologies, tools, and frameworks including React., NET, Databricks and Azure. This position is ideal for individuals eager to expand their technical skills, contribute to innovative projects, and grow as professionals in a collaborative environment.

Roles And Responsibilities


Develop a comprehensive understanding of the organization, including its overarching mission, core values, and strategic goals, to ensure alignment in all tasks and responsibilities.
Exhibit a proactive learning attitude during the various training sessions provided, effectively applying the knowledge gained to the projects and products supported throughout the tenure.
Learn and understand the technologies, tools, and frameworks used by the development team to contribute effectively to projects.
Initially, you will work under general guidance, with the opportunity to gradually take on more responsibility and handle tasks independently.
Work effectively as part of a distributed global team, collaborating with colleagues across different time zones and locations.


Key Requirements


Freshers who wish to pick up career opportunities in IT are eligible to apply.
Having knowledge of Redux, Databricks, SQL will be an added advantage.
Must have knowledge of basic frontend technologies including HTML, CSS, OOPS Concepts (Structural language e.g. C#), .NET CORE, JavaScript, React.js and its core principles.
Strong analytical and problem-solving skills.
Highly motivated with an eagerness to learn and a sense of ownership and accountability.


Qualification: Any Graduate (B.E, B.Tech, MCA) with less or no experience.

Personal Characteristics

Demonstrate Competencies Including


Teamwork - Work cooperatively and treat clients and co-workers with respect and dignity while valuing individual differences, encouraging new ideas and sharing information.
Commitment to excellence - Demonstrate commitment to being creative, innovative, flexible and adaptable, focusing on quality solutions, continually improving and being a winner.
Attention to Detail – Demonstrate a keen eye for accuracy and thoroughness in all tasks and responsibilities.
Time Management – Effectively prioritize and manage tasks to meet deadlines and maximize productivity.


What We Offer


Hands-on experience working with advanced software development technologies, tools, and frameworks.
Mentorship & Guidance: Receive mentorship from experienced professionals to help you grow in your data engineering career.
Global Collaboration: Join a global team and gain experience working in a distributed environment.
Learning Opportunities: Access to various training and development programs to enhance your skills and knowledge in the field of Software/Web Engineering.

description:

Experience: Freshers

eJAmerica is seeking bright, motivated graduates from reputed business schools (MBA) to join as Management Trainees. This program offers structured exposure to IT Service Delivery Management, Business Development Management, and Solutions Management. Learn and assist in IT service delivery operations, client engagement, and solution planning.
Support business development initiatives, proposals, and presentations.
Prepare and manage reports, dashboards, and project documentation.
Collaborate with cross-functional teams to meet delivery and client objectives.
Use ChatGPT and other AI tools to enhance productivity and quality of work.

Required Skills & Qualifications:

MBA (final-year students or recent graduates)
Excellent communication skills – verbal and written.
Strong multitasking and time-management abilities.
Proficiency in ChatGPT and other AI productivity tools.
Advanced Excel skills (data analysis, pivot tables, dashboards).

Positive attitude, eagerness to learn, and problem-solving mindset.

IT Service Delivery Manager Trainee

Solutions Manager Trainee

Milliman is among the world's largest providers of actuarial and related products and services. Our mission is to serve our clients to protect the health and financial well-being of people everywhere. Founded in 1947, Milliman is an independent firm with offices in major cities around the globe. We are owned and managed by our principals—senior consultants whose selection is based on their technical, professional, and business achievements. title: Management Trainee
description:
As a Graduate/Management Trainee – User Research, you will play a key role in helping us deeply understand our users. Your primary responsibility will be to connect with students through calls, gather insights on their needs, motivations, and challenges, and translate those conversations into meaningful inputs for our product and business teams. This role is ideal for someone who is curious, empathetic, and comfortable speaking with people every day.







The charter for this role will include:

Conduct telephonic and virtual conversations with students to understand their journeys, needs, and decision-making processes.
Ask the right questions to uncover insights around study abroad aspirations, challenges, and behaviors.
Document and synthesize conversations into clear insights, patterns, and actionable takeaways.
Work closely with product, growth, and business teams to share user feedback and influence decisions.
Continuously improve research quality by refining scripts, questions, and approaches based on learnings.







Ideal Persona would:

Strong communication skills with high comfort in speaking to new people over calls every day.
Naturally curious with the ability to ask thoughtful questions and listen actively.
Empathetic and able to build trust quickly with students from diverse backgrounds.
Structured thinker who can convert conversations into clear insights and patterns.
Self-driven and comfortable working in a fast-paced, ambiguous environment.







Everyone at Leap is entrepreneurial, moves fast and operates with extreme ownership.

There is minimal management and extreme autonomy.

If the above defines you, you will fight in snugly







What is Leap?

Leap is a global student mobility platform that empowers students’ aspirations for a global career and education

We have built this and this and this

We work at the exciting intersection of fintech & edtech

And we love that we succeed as a business while powering the dreams of talented students!




How far along are we?

We are the leaders in our space by a mile!

We are backed by Sequoia, Jungle Ventures, Owl Ventures & Harvard!

Read the latest fundraise news here




Who are we as people?

We have a lean, rockstar team.

We have come this far with a lean team because we love to increase the talent density with every new member we add. Yes, we are more picky than the usual company.

We hire slowly and deliberately




You can meet our founders here -> Arnav Kumar and Vaibhav Singh

Arnav tweets here

What will you be doing?

We are now building our leadership team and would love to engage

This is a great time to join the rocketship and participate in the upside -




Broadly,

You will be solving complex branding problems
With massive upside if you solve them
In a super fast paced environment that will challenge you
With enough resources to be audacious
And mentorship from an experienced founding team

title: EBO Program management Intern
description:
About Cult - Curefit Healthcare Pvt Ltd, founded in 2016, is India’s largest fitness company and wellness platform. Cult, from the house of Curefit, was established with a mission to make fitness easy, fun and accessible to everyone, and has emerged as a community celebrating the joy of fitness. The brand today offers a range of fitness services ranging from group workouts, gyms and personalized fitness solutions, as well as an expansive selection of quality fitness products for the everyday athlete. The company’s vision is to empower everyone towards an active and healthier lifestyle through innovative fitness solutions, enabled by technology.




Program Management Intern

Description:

We are looking for a Program Management Intern to support the planning, coordination, and execution of key business initiatives while working closely with cross-functional teams. This role provides hands-on exposure to project tracking, stakeholder management, and data-driven decision-making in a fast-paced environment.

Roles & Responsibilities:

Assist in planning and executing ongoing programs and projects
Track timelines, milestones, and deliverables to ensure timely completion
Maintain project trackers and prepare regular reports and dashboards
Coordinate with cross-functional teams and follow up on action items
Identify risks, bottlenecks, and dependencies, and support mitigation
Support data analysis and generate insights for decision-making
Document processes, workflows, and key learnings

title: SDE Intern
description:
About the Role

We're looking for a motivated and technically strong SDE Intern to join our engineering team. You'll work on robust systems and workflows that enable internal users and the overall development of the product. You will build backend services, integrate with external APIs, and collaborate with the team to meet their use cases. This is a hands-on role where you'll have the agency to think and act to drive fast/iterative progress across multiple fronts.

What You'll Do

Design and build backend services and APIs that are accessible, fault-tolerant, and well-tested.
Integrate with third-party and internal APIs to extend product capabilities.
Work with AI agents and LLM-powered workflows, applying sound engineering practices (testing, validation, guardrails) to ensure robustness
Write and reason through unit and integration tests, thinking critically about coverage, edge cases, and failure modes.
Collaborate with senior engineers on system design, service orchestration, and architectural decisions.
Work with data stores and infrastructure tooling relevant to the stack.

What We're Looking For

Must Have

A strong portfolio of personal or academic technical projects, with a clear backend focus (bonus if any are live or deployed).
Proficiency in Python and/or a solid grasp of an end-to-end backend stack; full-stack experience is a plus.
Experience integrating with external APIs (REST, GraphQL, webhooks, etc.).
A testing mindset, ability to think about how to validate, test, and harden implementations rather than just writing code that works on the happy path.

Good to Have

Familiarity with common backend tooling: SQL/NoSQL databases, Redis (caching), message queues (e.g. Kafka, RabbitMQ, SQS), and search platforms like OpenSearch/Elasticsearch
Exposure to AI agents or LLM-based systems, with an understanding of how they work and where they can fail.
Docker / container basics.
Git and collaborative development workflows.
Familiarity with any cloud provider (AWS, GCP, Azure).

Bonus Points

Experience building MCP (Model Context Protocol) servers.
Experience designing fault-tolerant or resilient workflows that can recover gracefully from failures without data loss (e.g. idempotent jobs, retry logic).
General understanding of ML concepts, enough to engage meaningfully with product requirements and the models powering our systems.

What You'll Gain

Ownership of features that are aimed at varying use-cases.
Agency to take decisions to meet requirements.
Exposure to modern AI/LLM engineering practices.
Mentorship from senior engineers across backend, ML, and platform.
Experience working within an agile team on meaningful work.




Show more

Join WWF-India as a Fundraiser and be our Conservation Ambassador at Airports!

Do you love talking to people and want your words to make a real difference? WWF-India is looking for passionate, confident, and outgoing individuals to engage with travelers at airports and inspire them to support our mission to save the nature and biodiversity of our country.

As the face of WWF-India, you will:


Interact with travelers at the airport and share stories of our conservation work across India.
Encourage and inspire them to contribute towards protecting wildlife and nature.
Be a proud representative of one of the world’s most respected conservation organizations.



Benefits

Work in 6-hour flexible shifts inside airports with full amenities.

â Opportunity to work with the WWF-India, gain knowledge on conservation issues, and develop life skills and confidence.

â Attractive salary plus performance-based incentives .

Job Location – Hyderabad Airport

If you’re energetic, people-oriented, and driven by a cause, this is your chance to turn Conversations into Conservation !

Apply now and be the change nature needs!

title: Trainee Regional Finance
description:
About this Position: Accomplishes tasks as directed by supervisor(s) and supports processes/operations of the respective Henkel team. Complies with Henkel's internal guidelines, rules and regulations.

What you´ll do:


Support the Finance team in monthly closing activities, financial analysis, and special projects, gaining hands-on experience in real-world business operations
Assist in preparing financial reports, business presentations, and performance dashboards for leadership review
Work closely with cross-functional teams to support operational processes, ensuring alignment with Henkel’s internal policies and global compliance standards
Contribute to the execution of strategic initiatives, helping identify areas for efficiency and improvement
Take ownership of assigned tasks, with guidance from experienced mentors and supervisors, in a collaborative and inclusive team environment


What makes you a good fit:


CA certified with minimum 01 year of work experience
Strong analytical thinking and problem-solving abilities, with a keen eye for detail and accuracy
A proactive, self-driven mindset with a genuine eagerness to learn, contribute, and grow in a fast-paced corporate environment
Proficiency in Microsoft Excel and PowerPoint; familiarity with financial systems or ERP tools (e.g., SAP) is an added advantage
Excellent verbal and written communication skills, with the ability to collaborate effectively across teams and functions
Candidates must be based in Navi Mumbai and available for full-time, on-site engagement


Some perks of joining Henkel:


Diverse national and international growth opportunities
Global wellbeing standards with health and preventive care programs
Gender-neutral parental leave for a minimum of 8 weeks
Best-in-class Group Medical Insurance policy covering employee, spouse and up to 2 children
Competitive accident and term life policies for up to 3 times annual gross salary
Progressive OPD policy of INR 30,000 for employee, spouse and up to 2 children


At Henkel, we come from a broad range of backgrounds, perspectives, and life experiences. We believe the uniqueness of all our employees is the power in us. Become part of the team and bring your uniqueness to us! We look for a diverse team of individuals who possess different backgrounds, experiences, personalities and mindsets.
